---
title: "The smallest experiment that would validate DIDs"
description: "Before any credential or harvesting work, mint did:web for two or three federation participants on GitHub Pages and test four falsifiable hypotheses."
date: "2026-07-19"
categories: [field-notes, identity]
draft: false
---

::: {.callout-note title="Status"}
**Plan.** Nothing here has been built or run yet.
:::

**What happened.** Portability and one-graph are the hypotheses that would change our mind; a ledger extension (KERI over blockchain) is gated behind them.

**Why it matters.** Before any credential or harvesting work, mint did:web for two or three federation participants on GitHub Pages and test four falsifiable hypotheses.

**Details.** Drawn from the wiki's DID-Federation-Experiment. This is a plan, not a result.
